name: EOM Inventory Valuation Summary
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can quickly assess month-end inventory financial position by accessing the EOM Inventory Valuation Summary, which provides high-level inventory value totals without detailed line-item breakdowns. This summary report helps retail operators perform rapid financial assessments and month-end checks, providing accountants with essential inventory asset figures for financial statement preparation without overwhelming detail."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the EOM Inventory Valuation Summary helps retail operators efficiently communicate inventory asset values to accounting teams and support streamlined month-end financial closing processes."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Inventory Valuation Summary Report allows you to view and export your product stock quantity information, including stock quantities for the available, on-order, and transfer in and out"}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "stock buckets"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This report uses the same filters as the"}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Inventory Valuation"}, {"text": ", however, COGS is also available across each stock status for review."}]}, {"type": "p",
